title: DCMS letter (16 May 2025) to Fried Frank on consent to derogations from 30 January Pre-emptive Action Order
body: "Secretary of State for Culture, Media and Sport’s response to the letter dated 14 April 2025 requesting the consent to take action which would otherwise contravene Public Interest Merger Reference (Telegraph Media Group Ltd) (Pre-emptive Action) Order 2024. "
